About Me

Hey everyone! I'm Akela Bhai — a Freelance Web Designer and Personal Branding Expert from India 🇮🇳. I build websites that actually grow businesses, not just look pretty. Author of Brand Yourself and MIND GAME: The Psychology of Influence.

Web Design Framer React/JSX HTML & CSS Personal Branding UI/UX SEO Figma Content Creation Glassmorphism
Freelance Web Designer akelabhai.com · 2022 – Present
Personal Branding Consultant Multi-platform content creator · Ongoing
Author Amazon KDP & Google Play Books · 2024–Present
Web Development Self-taught · HTML, CSS, JS, React, Framer
UI/UX Design Figma & Design Systems · Online Courses
